headline: lessons projects schema aligned with TEXT-keyed dimension

bullets: `lib/hook-utils.sh` gains a `_resolve_project_id` helper (called from `hook_init`) that replaces `PROJECT="$(basename "$PWD")"`. It looks up the canonical project_id in `sessions.db.project_paths` (read-only) keyed on the encoded `$PWD`. When sessions.db is absent it falls back to basename. When sessions.db exists but the encoded dir isn't registered, it emits one stderr line and leaves `PROJECT` empty — project-scoped lesson scope filters won't match (global lessons still surface), but hooks don't crash sessions. Aligns hook resolution with claude-sessions v0.48.0's TEXT-keyed projects dimension.
